name: Compagnie du Cambodge
summary: Compagnie du Cambodge provides communication consulting services in Europe, Africa, the Asia Pacific, and the Americas. It offers advertising and digital services, and transportation and logistics services; and operates a railway concession linking Burkina Faso with Ivory Coast. The company is based in Puteaux, France. Compagnie du Cambodge is a subsidiary of Plantations Des Terres Rouges S.A.
